title: AMD K6-2 released May 28, 1998
content:
AMD launched its K6-2 microprocessor on May 28, 1998, a little over a year after its predecessor, the K6. The K6-2 built upon the K6, increasing performance to better compete with the Pentium II. Since it still used the Socket

The post AMD K6-2 released May 28, 1998 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
